summary: Enterprise Hotel Operating System Hardening - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 30/30 pytest tests passed (100%). All runtime services (CMRuntime, WorkerRuntime, SecurityRuntime) return real DB data. Normalized health APIs return enriched contracts. Frontend: SystemHealthDashboard fully functional with all elements verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error (Push notification service - not related to hardening)

issues: WebSocket shows 'Polling' - expected behavior since WS not configured in test env

critical_code_review_comments: CMRuntimeService correctly queries MongoDB for drift_scan_results, channel_sync_logs, channel_connections, reconciliation_results
WorkerRuntimeService correctly queries task_queue, dead_letter_tasks collections with per_queue breakdown
SecurityRuntimeService correctly implements audit_validator, rate_limiter, tenant_guard, log_sanitizer
Normalized health APIs return enriched contract: data_freshness='real-time', evidence_summary, degraded_reason, critical_blockers, live_capable=true
All 5 subsystems in overview: channel_manager, workers, security, observability, alerts
Role-based dashboard correctly shapes panels by role (admin gets all 6 panels)
WebSocket broadcast_system_health_event and broadcast_health_metric_update functions exist and work
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hardening features complete. CMRuntimeService, WorkerRuntimeService, SecurityRuntimeService now use real MongoDB queries. Workers show 'critical' because no Celery worker is running (expected in dev env). Frontend dashboard at /system-health shows real data with WebSocket in Polling mode (expected when WS not connected).

backend_cm_runtime: test_cm_runtime_status_real_fields - health, severity, sync_stats, drift, reconciliation, providers, circuit_breakers
backend_worker_runtime: test_queue_health_real_fields - health, severity, per_queue, dead_letter, worker_heartbeat, retry_pressure, recommendations
test_worker_per_queue_breakdown - queue, health, pending for each queue type
backend_normalized_health: test_normalized_cm_enriched_contract - data_freshness='real-time', evidence_summary, live_capable=true, degraded_reason, critical_blockers
test_normalized_overview_all_subsystems - channel_manager, workers, security, observability, alerts
backend_role_dashboard: test_role_dashboard_admin_panels - queue_health, security, workers, drift_summary, sync_summary
backend_audit_live: test_audit_metrics_endpoint - drift, reconciliation, queue, security, dead_letter
frontend_system_health: All 4 metric cards found: metric-cm-health, metric-queue-health, metric-alerts, metric-stuck-tasks
All 5 subsystem cards found: normalized-channel_manager, normalized-workers, normalized-security, normalized-observability, normalized-alerts

queue_health.note: Critical because no Celery worker running - expected in dev

mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked. All runtime services now use real DB queries as verified by pytest.
